decision_points.evidence:
def _escape_html(text: str) -> str:
    """Escape HTML special characters"""
    if not text:
        return ''
    return (text
            .replace('&', '&')
            .replace('<', '<')
            .replace('>', '>')
            .replace('"', '"')
            .replace("'", '''))
